particulars.description: Means the properties known as 1) 648 abbeydale road, sheffield, S7 2BB; 2) 650 abbeydale road, sheffield, S7 2BB; 3) 652 and 654 abbeydale road, sheffield, S7 2BB; 4) 656 abbeydale road, sheffield, S7 2BB registered at H.M. land registry under title number SYK382422, SYK382423, SYK371291, SYK373663, YWE54998. And SYK7035.
648-656 abbeydale road, sheffield, S7 2BB and registered under title numbers SYK382422, SYK382423, SYK371291 and SYK373663.

All that property as follows (a) the freehold property known as 648 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK382422; (b) the freehold property known as 650 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK382423; (c) the freehold property known as 652 and 654 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK371291; (d) the freehold property known as 656 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK373663; (e) the leasehold property known as 648 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK7035; and (f) the leasehold property known as 650 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number YWE54998.

All that property as follows (a) the freehold property known as 648 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK382422; (b) the freehold property known as 650 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK382423; (c) the freehold property known as 652 and 654 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK371291; (d) the freehold property known as 656 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK373663; (e) the leasehold property known as 648 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number SYK7035; and (f) the leasehold property known as 650 abbeydale road, sheffield S7 2BB and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number YWE54998.
The marples building, fitzalan square, sheffield, S1 2AY.
